interpretation: The first-pass union counts for order 15 are confirmed exactly.
For order 17, the first-pass direct triangle-inflation counts are confirmed, and the Meredith generator actually hits 112 survivors total, not just the 35 Meredith-only residue survivors.
A second-pass Hajos search using the unique order-9 survivor with itself explains two additional order-17 survivors, indices 195 and 196.
